channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 240-million-year-old 'sand creeper' fossil discovered
item.description: A fossil found within a garden wall in Australia has been identified as a significant prehistoric discovery by scientists.

item.title: Webb telescope observes scorching 'super-Earth' resembling Mercury
item.description: Scientists have observed a hot, airless planet 48 light-years away, providing insights into the geology of distant worlds via the James Webb Space Telescope.

item.title: Oak trees delay spring to hinder caterpillars
item.description: Research indicates oak trees can delay their springtime growth as a defense against caterpillar populations.

item.title: AI assists chemists in molecular design
item.description: A new AI system, Synthegy, is streamlining the creation of complex molecules, a process typically requiring extensive expertise.
